title: Outer Entity
text: Outer Entity An Outer Entity is a Component Entity that has a child Component Entity . It is part of the data structure of the Component , which determines the access path to the data and the default component processing order and behavior. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: ent Main Development Object?
